resources.string: Combine these toggles to keep PlainApp (and your tunnel) running 24/7 — survives swipe-from-recents, Doze, and OEM background killers on Xiaomi, Realme, Oppo, Vivo, OnePlus and Samsung.
Required. Stops Doze from suspending the tunnel when the screen is off.
Biggest single win. Android keeps Accessibility services running with high priority — survives swipe-to-clear on MIUI/ColorOS.
Registers a do-nothing local VPN. After enabling, also turn on Settings > Network > VPN > Always-on VPN for PlainApp. While Always-on VPN is active, Android will not let the process die.
Bumps process priority and prevents accidental uninstall. To remove later, go to Settings > Security > Device admin apps and disable first.
An exact alarm fires every 5 minutes and restarts the tunnel if it has died. Self-healing.
1. Security app > Permissions > Autostart > enable PlainApp.\n2. Settings > Apps > PlainApp > Battery saver > No restrictions.\n3. Open recent apps, drag PlainApp card down, tap the padlock icon.

1. Settings > Battery > App Battery Management > PlainApp > turn ON \"Allow background activity\" and \"Allow auto-launch\".\n2. Settings > Apps > Auto-launch > enable PlainApp.\n3. Lock the app card in recent apps.
1. iManager > App Manager > Autostart Manager > enable PlainApp.\n2. Settings > Battery > Background power consumption > PlainApp > Allow.\n3. Lock the app card in recent apps.
1. Settings > Battery > Battery optimization > PlainApp > Don\'t optimize.\n2. Settings > Apps > PlainApp > Advanced > Battery > Allow background activity.\n3. Lock the app card in recent apps.

1. Settings > Apps > PlainApp > Battery > Unrestricted.\n2. Settings > Device care > Battery > Background usage limits > Never sleeping apps > add PlainApp.\n3. Settings > Device care > Battery > More battery settings > turn OFF \"Put unused apps to sleep\".
Just disable battery optimization above. Stock Android will not kill a foreground service.
What you get with everything enabled

• Tunnel survives swiping the app away from recents.
• Tunnel survives screen-off Doze (battery opt off + WakeLock).
• Tunnel auto-restarts after a phone reboot.
• 5-minute watchdog re-launches the tunnel if Android still kills it.
• Accessibility + VPN sink make the OEM killer leave the app alone.
• Device Admin bumps priority and prevents accidental uninstall.

Reality check: on Pixel/stock, this is effectively forever. On Xiaomi/Realme/Oppo/Vivo, this gets you ~99% uptime as long as you also did the manual brand-specific steps.
